description: Announced end of hiatus in March 2026 but no tour dates confirmed as of May 2026. Previously inactive since 2020 sexual misconduct allegations. Status highly uncertain.
recommendedAction: Mark as 'rarely' until confirmed dates emerge. Monitor for updates.

description: Disbanded 1970. Two members deceased. LOVE by Cirque du Soleil closed July 2024. No Beatles performances exist.
recommendedAction: Mark as 'retired'. Consider tracking Paul McCartney/Ringo Starr solo shows separately.

description: Wikipedia says Cowboy Carter Tour was 32 concerts with $407.6M gross, but Wikipedia infobox shows 24 concerts. Ticket numbers vary between sources.
recommendedAction: Use 32 concerts / $407.6M from the main article text.

description: Visual/sound artist, not a performing musician. Live appearances are one-off collaborative events at galleries/museums, not commercial tours.
recommendedAction: Mark as 'none'. This is expected for a gallery-based artist.

description: Deaf sound/visual artist. Practice centers on drawings, installations, murals. Does not perform music live.
recommendedAction: Mark as 'none'. Expected for a visual artist.

description: Annie Lennox retired from live performance. Dave Stewart tours solo as 'Eurythmics Songbook' with Vanessa Amorosi - not the original duo.
recommendedAction: Mark as 'rarely'. Note that current shows are Dave Stewart's solo interpretation.

description: Gallery-based sound/visual artist represented by Lisson Gallery. Creates installations, not live performances.
recommendedAction: Mark as 'none'. Expected for gallery-based artist.

description: Died in 2007. Estate-managed performances by Stockhausen Foundation and classical ensembles. Not the composer performing.
recommendedAction: Mark as 'retired'. His works are performed but he is not.

description: Inactive since 1994. Roger Waters tours solo (This Is Not a Drill ended 2023). David Gilmour tours solo. No Pink Floyd performances.
recommendedAction: Mark as 'retired'. Members tour solo but not together.

description: Gallery-based multidisciplinary sound artist. Works in installation, performance art, video, multimedia contexts. Not a touring musician.
recommendedAction: Mark as 'none'. Expected for gallery-based artist.

description: Age 89 (b. 1936). No longer performs personally. 90th birthday celebration festival Oct 2026 features his ensemble performing his works.
recommendedAction: Mark as 'rarely'. His ensemble performs; he does not personally.

description: Disbanded 1991. David Byrne refuses to reunite. Byrne tours solo with Talking Heads classics (2025-2026 Who Is The Sky tour). Not the original band.
recommendedAction: Mark as 'retired'. Byrne tours solo but not as Talking Heads.
